name: @tgraph/backend-generator
description: CLI toolkit for generating NestJS APIs, DTOs, and React Admin dashboards from Prisma schemas.

scripts.build: rimraf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json
scripts.package: npm run build && rimraf package && npm pack && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f=fs.readdirSync('.').find(x=>x.endsWith('.tgz')); fs.mkdirSync('package',{recursive:true}); require('child_process').execSync(`tar -xzf ${f} -C package`)"
scripts.release: npm run build && npm test && node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync(`git tag -a v${v} -m 'Release v${v}'`, {stdio: 'inherit'}); require('child_process').execSync(`git push origin v${v}`, {stdio: 'inherit'}); require('child_process').execSync(`gh release create v${v} --title 'v${v}' --notes-file CHANGELOG.md --latest`, {stdio: 'inherit'});"
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run release

author: Mohamed Elbaz
